aresLevelDescription: Red Ultravibes spawn as random negative variants
erebosLevelDescription: Glitches the screen and hides the next piece display
gaiaLevelDescription: Green Ultravibes spawn as random negative variants
heliosLevelDescription: Orange Ultravibes spawn as random negative variants
icarusLevelDescription: If a piece isn't placed within 5 seconds, a trash line is spawned
kronosLevelDescription: Increases the falling speed of Ultravibes
minotaurLevelDescription: Spawns a trash line every time you use a discard
nemesisLevelDescription: Disables the current Ultravibe if not placed within a few seconds
oceanusLevelDescription: Blue Ultravibes spawn as random negative variants
persephoneLevelDescription: Lose -1 discard for each line cleared
rizaLevelDescription: Ultravibes are base colors only (Red, Green, Orange, Blue)... except some
themisLevelDescription: Every 3 lines cleared spawns a trash line
titanosLevelDescription: Drops the Ultravibe after a few seconds if not placed
xenonLevelDescription: Every placement converts one random block on the grid to a negative variant
zeusLevelDescription: Instantly drops the piece if you make more than 15 total moves
normalLevelDescription: Just a normal level, no modifiers!
